title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.530 - Governor shall order militia into federal service, when
text:
41.530.  Governor shall order militia into federal service, when. — Whenever the militia or any part thereof is called, ordered or drafted under the constitution and laws of the United States, the governor shall order for service the National Guard, Air National Guard and the naval militia or such part thereof as may be required.
(L. 1951 p. 654 § 20)
